_comment: Personal Brain MCP — drop-in for ~/.claude/settings.json. Slice 3 ships an installer that merges this into the user's existing config without clobbering.

SessionStart._note: Announces this device's MCPs + secret refs. Returns scope hints used by subsequent context calls.

UserPromptSubmit._note: Returns relevant skills + facts + wiring + secret refs filtered by scope ACL. Inject result.injection into system_prompt.

PostToolUse._note: Persist memory ops (ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP) with immutable provenance.

Stop._note: Submit trace at turn end. Reflexion worker scores novelty + success; mints skill via Voyager+SkillWeaver pipeline (Slice 5).
